parsed_review.summary: CP00-714 is a clean descriptor-only continuation of the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations lineage (CP00-694..CP00-713), bridging the P07 Permission And Audit Binding evidence/fixture/test/review tail (8 units, RP23.P07.M05.S15-S22) into the Synthetic Fixture Set head (2 units, RP23.P07.M06.S01-S02). Independent read-only inspection confirms: (1) pack identity, risk class A, unit_count 10, and range are consistent across manifest, registry binding, baseline, contract current_pack/latest_pack, plan live_state, and next-pack-queue; (2) deliverable_distribution {hermes_evidence:2,fixture:1,test:2,security_audit:1,claude_review:1,implementation:1,failure_recovery:2} and micro_title_distribution {Permission And Audit Binding:8,Synthetic Fixture Set:2} match exactly in registry REQUIREMENTS, manifest included_units, and the generated contract cp714 coverage summary; (3) implementation is genuinely descriptor-only -- createCaseSet/createDescriptor emit declarative structures carrying a comprehensive NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION, and validateDescriptor enforces descriptor_only rows, no runtime execution, no financial/credential/raw payloads, no permission-decision or audit-event-body leakage, and no real data; (4) authority boundaries are preserved (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-715; Claude packet read_only=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false); (5) Hermes is used only as a deterministic control-plane evidence-packet identifier (receipt_shape descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded as product runtime; (6) model.test.js covers CP00-714 binding/coverage, runtime-closed packets, and contract-projection-latest, and the contract validation block reports cp714 coverage and descriptor both valid with empty errors and overall valid=true; (7) command-evidence shows all 25 commands (node --check, node --test, all required validate gates, git diff --check, build) exiting 0, and the readiness auth preflight passed with a well-formed JSON result (no auth failure, no 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped output); (8) the review scaffolding is hardened -- read-only tools only, no full diff/source embedded in the prompt, summary-only prohibited due to security/review deliverables, so full source inspection was performed via Read/Grep/Glob. The pack correctly does NOT claim production_ready or runtime_ready (both false) and makes no enterprise-trust claim, so the human-final-approval boundary remains outside this receipt. A defensive sweep for secrets/real financial data found none. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the pack is eligible to record this passing hardened read-only review and advance toward closeout, with final human/enterprise-trust approval remaining out of scope for this receipt.
